source_chinese: 财政部宣布将延长针对小微企业的增值税减免政策至2027年12月底。
agent_translation: Will China extend VAT exemption for small/micro enterprises to end-2027?

ground_truth_translation.primary: Will China's Ministry of Finance officially extend the VAT exemption for small and micro enterprises to December 31, 2027 by August 31, 2026?
alternative_phrasings: Will China extend the VAT exemption for small and micro enterprises through December 31, 2027 by August 31, 2026?
Will the Ministry of Finance publish an official notice extending the small-and-micro-enterprise VAT exemption to end-2027 by August 31, 2026?
Will China's MoF formally extend the VAT exemption for small/micro enterprises to 2027-12-31 by August 31, 2026?
ground_truth_translation.rationale: The source already implies the action is announced ('财政部宣布') — but a Polymarket-quality question must hinge on a future-resolvable event. The canonical reading is: the source describes intent; the market resolves YES when the formal MoF notice exists on mof.gov.cn extending VAT exemption to >= 2027-12-31, observed before the cutoff. Two dates must appear: (1) target extension date (2027-12-31) and (2) cutoff for the announcement (2026-08-31). Agent's title leaves the cutoff ambiguous, conflating it with 'end-2027' which is the policy target, not the market resolution date.

polymarket_shape_validation.resolution_criteria: Official MoF publication on mof.gov.cn explicitly stating VAT exemption/reduction for small and micro enterprises (小微企业) is extended to at least 2027-12-31, observed on or before 2026-08-31T23:59:59+08:00.
polymarket_shape_validation.uma_dispute_risk: medium - resolution requires checking whether the announcement counts as 'extension'; partial or conditional extensions could be litigated
polymarket_shape_validation.duplicate_risk: low - VAT-extension questions are rare on Polymarket

comparable_polymarket_markets.market: Trump eliminates capital gains tax on crypto in 2025?
Trump eliminates capital gains tax on crypto before 2027?
comparable_polymarket_markets.similarity: tax policy P1 with 'before YEAR' resolution

comparable_polymarket_markets.market: Billionaire one-time wealth tax passes in California election 2026?

k5_framing_variants: Will China's Ministry of Finance officially extend the VAT exemption for small and micro enterprises to December 31, 2027 by August 31, 2026?
Will China extend the small-and-micro VAT exemption through end-2027 by August 31, 2026?
Will the MoF publish an official notice extending the small/micro VAT exemption to 2027-12-31 by August 31, 2026?
Will China's small/micro enterprise VAT exemption be formally extended into 2027 by August 31, 2026?
Will China extend the VAT exemption for small and micro enterprises beyond 2026 (to >= 2027-12-31) by August 31, 2026?

mqm_critical_errors.detail: Agent title 'extend ... to end-2027' is ambiguous between (a) the target extension date and (b) the market resolution cutoff. A trader reading only the title cannot tell when the market resolves. Description disambiguates, but D5 (resolution clarity) ideally requires title-level disambiguation.

mqm_minor_errors: STYLE/Register: 'end-2027' is corpus-rare; canonical Polymarket form is 'December 31, 2027' or '2027-12-31'. The agent's compact form is informal.
STYLE/Acronym: 'VAT' is acceptable globally but the resolution source (mof.gov.cn) is a Chinese government source where the local term is 增值税. Not a translation error, but worth noting for D6.

d1_structural.note: 'Will X to end-2027?' matches the will_x_no_date branch; 'end-2027' is interpreted as a date token

d2_stylistic.note: Length (~10 words) is on the shorter side but within corpus range for policy questions

d5_resolution_clarity.note: FAILS — title conflates target extension date with market cutoff. Description is needed to disambiguate. Ground truth fixes this with explicit dual dates.

d8_duplicate_detection.note: No similar China VAT-extension markets in corpus snapshot

annotator_notes: Hardest sample of the five. The Chinese source already says 'announced' (宣布), but a Polymarket question must resolve on a future event — so the ground truth reframes this as 'will the official MoF notice exist on mof.gov.cn by cutoff'. Agent translation is concise but D5-failing. BLEU vs primary will be moderate because the ground truth has a much longer title.
